items.name: Roman "II Parthica" Clipeus
items.description:
"Servus Sōlis Invīctī sum, Restitūtor Orbis sum."

Legio II Parthica was founded by Roman Emperor Septimus Severus in the late 2nd Century AD. It came on to be one of the most iconic legions of the 3rd Century Crisis, notably for killing Emperor Maximinus "Thrax."

Created by: Davicolt
Modeled by: Davicolt
Textured by: Davicolt

Support Davicolt's work! He is a very talented 3D modeler and deserves lots of credit.
